components.value: V, S, M/DF (a few hairs, or a pinch of dung, from a bull)

description.value: The subject becomes stronger. The spell grants a +4 enhancement bonus to Strength, adding the usual benefits to melee attack rolls, melee damage rolls, and other uses of the Strength modifier. Bull’s Strength, Mass This spell functions like bull’s strength, except that it affects multiple creatures. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook.
